name: Mushroom Tomato Sauce M/w I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. MICROWAVE 2 CUPS COARSELY CHOPPED OR THINLY SLICED MUSHROOMS ALONG WITH OIL AND GARLIC in a paper towel covered casserole on HIGH for 3 1/2 to 4 minutes, stirring at half time.
2. ADD the remaining ingredients in JIFFY TOMATO SAUCE and proceed as per the recipe directions.
3. MAKES FIVE CUPS.
